name: Atraxa, Grand Unifier
oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink
When Atraxa, Grand Unifier enters the battlefield, reveal the top ten cards of your library. For each card type among them, you may put a card of that type from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
design_notes: The ultimate mythic top-end creature. Demonstrates: (1) stacking multiple keyword abilities on one line (flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink — one from each color), (2) a massive ETB effect that can draw up to 7 cards by card type, (3) the 'reveal' template for library manipulation, (4) how 7-mana creatures need to be game-ending to justify their cost. Four colors but notably missing red, reflected in no haste or damage abilities. Each keyword maps to a color: flying (U/W), vigilance (W), deathtouch (B), lifelink (W/B).
